message:
Add comprehensive E2E tests for bundle discovery and exploration

Tests cover 22 scenarios including:
- Bundles page load and display (title, grid, featured first)
- Bundle card structure and interactions (Install button, View navigation)
- Bundle detail page content (header, workflow, prompts, sidebar)
- Navigation flow between bundles list and detail pages
- Responsive layout (mobile stacked, desktop multi-column grid)
- 404 handling for non-existent bundles

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
